subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Recognise roles and processes in advertising

sections.heading: Relevant Words
sections.content: The note defines advertisement, target, advertising, publicity, market, and branding.

sections.heading: Examples of Meaning
sections.content: Advertisement is any text, picture, illustration, or music used in creating awareness about a product or service. Target is the group at which an advert is aimed. Branding is the activity of giving a product or service a particular name and image.
